title: 金融产品的道德营销与销售 / Ethical Marketing & Sale
summary: 营销须均衡、真实、不误导;基于需求推荐适当产品;禁高压销售与隐瞒,充分披露风险费用,尊重冷静期。 / Marketing must be balanced, truthful and non-misleading; recommend suitable products based on needs; no high-pressure tactics or concealment; disclose risks and fees; respect cooling-off.

sections.heading: 原则
sections.body: 信息均衡(不夸大收益、不淡化风险);不作虚假/误导陈述;推荐有合理基础并适合;充分披露费用风险。

sections.heading: Principles
sections.body: Balanced information (no exaggerated returns, no downplayed risks); no false/misleading statements; reasonable basis and suitability; full disclosure of fees and risks.

sections.heading: 禁止行为
sections.body: 高压销售、制造紧迫感逼单、隐瞒重要信息、承诺回报、利用客户不了解牟利。

sections.heading: Prohibited
sections.body: High-pressure selling, manufactured urgency, concealing material facts, promising returns, exploiting the client’s lack of understanding.

keyPoints: 均衡、真实、不误导 / Balanced, truthful, non-misleading
基于需求的合理推荐 / Needs-based reasonable recommendation
禁高压销售与隐瞒 / No high-pressure or concealment
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Ethical Marketing & Sale of Financial Products
